notes.anchor: the long-togged scaramouch the Town-Ho ’s company told us of
notes.note: Scaramouch (from Italian scaramuccia, skirmisher) was a stock comic villain in commedia dell'arte theater: boastful, cowardly, and easily beaten. Stubb's use of the word signals that he reads the ranting Gabriel as a theatrical fraud rather than the archangel the terrified crew take him for.
